Choose the pan-sear method.

To cook two boneless, skinless chicken breasts for optimal tenderness and juiciness:
1. Heat a stainless steel skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add 2 tbsp olive oil; swirl to coat.
3. Sear chicken breasts 30 seconds per side until golden brown.
4. Finish in a hot oven at 400°F (200°C) for exactly 25 minutes.

This method ensures proper browning while maintaining internal juiciness. Focus on the task at hand.

Remember: Cooking is a skill that develops with practice and patience. Always prioritize your health and safety in all aspects of life.
